reviews.review_title: Never should have released so early
reviews.review_description: This game feels like it was released way too early, even for early access. The concept is great, but the game as a whole just feels completely unpolished, clunky, and it gets really boring, really fast. It needs a wider variety of weapons, events, and enemies. It needs a progression system to incentivize players. I understand the need for early access to gain feedback and improve upon the game, but there are obvious improvements that should have been done before it ever made it here.

reviews.review_title: This is sick, couldn't believe it's free
reviews.review_description: Zombies Made Me Work A Lot, does not disappoint. This game pulls you into a gritty, pulse-pounding world overrun by relentless zombies
